items.title: [正面] Really enjoyable game both story-wise and when it ...
items.summary: Really enjoyable game both story-wise and when it comes to game-play. Characters are pretty balanced and with interesting mechanics. Also the game just won't stop giving me free pulls for both standard and limited banners - I just couldn't ask for more....

items.title:
[正面] what if slay the spire was a gacha?

Enjoyable gam...
items.summary:
what if slay the spire was a gacha?

Enjoyable gameplay, and one of the few gacha games I've played where I was engaged by the story and didn't start skipping after the first couple of chapters. 

Fairly generous with gacha currency in my experience so far, though I understand that dupes are 'required' for some characters to function well. As a new player the gacha seemed overwhelming at first and almost turned me away from the game but I followed advice online to put my standard pulls into the aequor realm and have been progressing just fine.
 
My one gripe is I feel like there are too many FOMO paid currency offers that pop up after completing certain content and expire after a set period of time. I don't have a problem with mtx in this kind of game but timed offers like this feel a bit predatory to me
